# About GIC

## Our Mission

The Government Information Centre (GIC) is dedicated to providing citizens with comprehensive, accessible, and reliable government information and services. We bridge the gap between citizens and government institutions to ensure everyone has equal access to essential services.

## Our Vision

To create a transparent, citizen-centric government service ecosystem where all individuals can easily access, understand, and utilize government services with minimal hassle and maximum efficiency.

## Key Features

### 24/7 Support

Round-the-clock assistance through our citizen hotline and live chat support.

### Multilingual Access

Services available in Sinhala, Tamil, and English to serve all citizens.

### Comprehensive Services

All government services in one place, from education to healthcare and more.

## About GIC
